item.title: How the Iran conflict is spreading â in pictures
item.description: Images published Thursday showed destruction across Tehran after nearly a week of strikes on Iran's capital.

item.title: How Iran and Venezuela strikes transform the Trump-Xi trade talks
item.description: The Iran war and the U.S. attack in Venezuela show a Trump administration more willing to eschew diplomacy and take military action.

item.title: Republican Representative Gonzales to end re-election bid after sex allegations
item.description: U.S. Representative Tony Gonzales will not seek re-election, following allegations that he had an affair with a former staff member who later died by ...

item.title: Justice Department publishes missing Epstein files involving uncorroborated claim about Trump
item.description: The Justice Department on Thursday released additional Jeffrey Epstein files involving uncorroborated accusations made by a woman against President Do...

item.title: Trump taps Sen. Markwayne Mullin after firing Kristi Noem as DHS secretary
item.description: Noem's chief advisor, Corey Lewandowski, will also leave his position at DHS, MS Now reported.
